headline_seed: Trump names Bill Pulte acting director of national intelligence - Politico
draft_text:
Trump named Bill Pulte acting DNI on June 2, 2026 — replacing Tulsi Gabbard. Pulte has no intelligence background. He will keep running FHFA and Fannie Mae/Freddie Mac simultaneously. NPR notes the law requires "extensive national security expertise."

And that's the mews.
